message:
bd-ml2r.9.1: add CLI controls for FNX integration modes

Add command-line flags for controlling FNX graph analysis:

--fnx-mode (auto|enabled|disabled):
  - auto: Use FNX when feature is available (default)
  - enabled: Force FNX on, error if unavailable
  - disabled: Skip all FNX analysis

--fnx-projection (undirected|directed|auto):
  - undirected: Ignore edge direction for analysis (default)
  - directed: Preserve edge direction
  - auto: Select based on diagram type

--fnx-fallback (graceful|strict|warn):
  - graceful: Fall back silently when analysis fails (default)
  - strict: Error instead of falling back
  - warn: Log warning but continue

Adds FnxModeArg, FnxProjectionArg, FnxFallbackArg enums with:
- ValueEnum derive for clap parsing
- as_str() methods for structured logging
- should_use_fnx() for runtime decision making

Debug-level logging emits FNX configuration at render time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
